name: Piquant Salmon Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, soften the cream cheese and stir in the chopped walnuts, chives, and celery.
2. Add 2 teaspoons of lemon juice and spices, then mix well.
3. Spread the cream cheese mixture evenly on each slice of smoked salmon and season with pepper.
4. Roll up the salmon to form neat rolls.
5. Toast slices of whole-wheat bread and cut 8 rounds (approximately 2.5 inches) using a biscuit cutter.
6. Spread butter thinly on each bread round.
7. Place a cucumber slice on each bread round, then place a salmon roll on top of each cucumber slice.
8. Drizzle with remaining lemon juice and garnish with dill sprigs and chives, if desired.
9. Note: Salmon rolls can be prepared several hours in advance and refrigerated. Toast the bases beforehand for best results. Once assembled, serve within 30 minutes.
